text: ‘The Prophet (&) took a room made of date paim leaves mats in the mosque. Allah's Messenger () prayed in it for a few nights ill the people gathered (to pray the night prayer (Tarawih) (behind him.) Then on the 4th night the people did not hear his voice and they thought he had slept, so some of them started humming in order that he might come out. The Prophet () then said, *You continued doing ‘what | saw you doing tll | was afraid that this (Tarawih prayer) might be enjoined on you, and if it were enjoined on you, you would not Gontinue performing it. Therefore, O people! Perform your prayers at ‘your homes, for the best prayer of a person is what is performed at his home except the compulsory congregational) prayer® (See Hadith No. 229Vol. 3) (See Hadith No. 134, Vol 8) [ — + Sahih al-Bukhari 7290
